Finset.card_le_of_subset h
  exact h₁

def radiating_map {s t : Finset ℕ} (h : s ⊆ t) : radiating_type s → radiating_type t := by
  intro x
  exact ⟨x.1, by aesop⟩

def radiating_system_of_measurements : ∀ (s : Finset ℕ), Nonempty (radiating_type s) := by
  intro s
  have h : s ∈ Finset.univ := Finset.mem_univ s
  have h₁ : Nonempty (radiating_type s) := by
    by_cases h₂ : s = ∅
    · subst h₂
      exact ⟨⟨0, by simp⟩⟩
    · have h₃ : s.Nonempty := Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr h₂
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₃
      exact ⟨⟨x, by aesop⟩⟩
  exact h₁

def radiating_norms (s : Finset ℕ) : ℝ := (s.card : ℝ)

def radiating_subnorm {s t : Finset ℕ} (h : s ⊆ t) : radiating_norms s ≤ radiating_norms t := by
  have h₁ : (s.card : ℝ) ≤ (t.card : ℝ) := by
    exact_mod_cast Finset.card_le_of_subset h
  exact h₁

def radiating_inner_product (s : Finset ℕ) : ℝ := (s.card : ℝ)

def radiating_inner_product_sub {s t : Finset ℕ} (h : s ⊆ t) : radiating_inner_product s ≤ radiating_inner_product t := by
  have h₁ : (s.card : ℝ) ≤ (t.card : ℝ) := by
    exact_mod_cast Finset.card_le_of_subset h
  exact h₁

variable (u : Type u) [Fintype u] [DecidableEq u]
variable (v : Type v) [Fintype v] [DecidableEq v]

def radiating_finset_map (s : Finset u) : Finset (Finset u) := by
  classical
  exact Finset.map (Finset.mem_coe) s

def radiating_photon_counter : ∀ (s : Finset u), s.card ≤ Fintype.card u := by
  intro s
  have h₁ : s.card ≤ Fintype.card u := by
    apply (Finset.card_le_univ s)
  exact h₁

def radiating_counting_measurements : ∀ (s : Finset u), s.card ≤ Fintype.card u := by
  intro s
  exact radiating_photon_counter s

def radiating_counting_submeasurements {s t : Finset u} (h : s ⊆ t) : s.card ≤ t.card := by
  exact Finset.card_le_of_subset h

def radiating_luciferase (s : Finset u) : ℕ := s.card

def radiating_luciferase_sub {s t : Finset u} (h : s ⊆ t) : radiating_luciferase s ≤ radiating_luciferase t := by
  have h₁ : s.card ≤ t.card := Finset.card_le_of_subset h
  exact h₁

def radiating_luciferase_norm (s : Finset u) : ℝ := (s.card : ℝ)

def radiating_luciferase_subnorm {s t : Finset u} (h : s ⊆ t) : radiating_luciferase_norm s ≤ radiating_luciferase_norm t := by
  have h₁ : (s.card : ℝ) ≤ (t.card : ℝ) := by
    exact_mod_cast Finset.card_le_of_subset h
  exact h₁

def radiating_luciferase_inner_product (s : Finset u) : ℝ := (s.card : ℝ)

def radiating_luciferase_inner_product_sub {s t : Finset u} (h : s ⊆ t) : radiating_luciferase_inner_product s ≤ radiating_luciferase_inner_product t := by
  have h₁ : (s.card : ℝ) ≤ (t.card : ℝ) := by
    exact_mod_cast Finset.card_le_of_subset h
  exact h₁

def radiating_subsets (s : Finset u) : Finset (Finset u) := by
  classical
  exact s.powerset

def radiating_subsets_card (s : Finset u) : ℕ := 2 ^ s.card

def radiating_subsets_subcard {s t : Finset u} (h : s ⊆ t) : radiating_subsets_card s ≤ radiating_subsets_card t := by
  have h₁ : s.card ≤ t.card := Finset.card_le_of_subset h
  have h₂ : 2 ^ s.card ≤ 2 ^ t.card := by
    apply pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num)
    exact h₁
  exact h₂

def radiating_subsets_map (s : Finset u) : Finset (Finset u) := by
  classical
  exact s.powerset

def radiating_max_count : ℕ := Fintype.card u

def radiating_max_subset_count : ℕ := 2 ^ Fintype.card u

def radiating_subset_card_le_max (s : Finset u) : s.card ≤ Fintype.card u := by
  exact Finset.card_le_univ s

def radiating_subset_count_le_max (s : Finset (Finset u)) : s.card ≤ 2 ^ Fintype.card u := by
  have h₁ : s.card ≤ (Finset.powerset (Finset.univ : Finset u)).card := by
    calc
      s.card ≤ (Finset.powerset (Finset.univ : Finset u)).card := by
        have h₂ : s ⊆ Finset.powerset (Finset.univ : Finset u) := by
          intro t ht
          have h₃ : t ⊆ Finset.univ := by
            intro x hx
            simp_all [Finset.mem_univ]
          simp_all [Finset.mem_powerset]
        exact Finset.card_le_of_subset h₂
      _ = (Finset.powerset (Finset.univ : Finset u)).card := by rfl
  have h₂ : (Finset.powerset (Finset.univ : Finset u)).card = 2 ^ Fintype.card u := by
    simp [Finset.card_powerset, Fintype.card_finset]
    <;>
    simp_all [Finset.card_univ]
    <;>
    simp_all [Fintype.card_finset]
  rw [h₂] at h₁
  exact h₁

def radiating_subset_card_le_max' (s : Finset u) : s.card ≤ Fintype.card u := by
  exact Finset.card_le_univ s

def radiating_subset_count_le_max' (s : Finset (Finset u)) : s.card ≤ 2 ^ Fintype.card u := by

          simp_all [Finset.mem_powerset]
        exact Finset.card_le_of_subset h₂
      _ = (Finset.powerset (Finset.univ : Finset u)).card := by rfl
  have h₂ : (Finset.powerset (Finset.univ : Finset u)).card = 2 ^ Fintype.card u := by

    <;>
    simp_all [Finset.card_univ]
    <;>
    simp_all [Fintype.card_finset]

def radiating_subset_card_le_max'' (s : Finset u) : s.card ≤ Fintype.card u := by
  exact Finset.card_le_univ s

def radiating_subset_count_le_max'' (s : Finset (Finset u)) : s.card ≤ 2 ^ Fintype.card u := by
  have h₁ : s.card ≤ (Finset.powerset (Finset.univ : Finset u)).card := by
